DISCOVERY 612, DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSES TO SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES -- KRISTEN A. PICO APPEARING FOR DEFENDANT ST. LUKE'S HOSPITAL. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: MOTION IS GRANTED AS THE FURTHER RESPONSES ARE NOT VERIFIED. VERIFICATION SHALL BE MADE WITHIN 10 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. THE COURT FINDS THAT THE INADEQUATE RESPONSES WERE A MISUSE OF THE DISCOVERY PROCESS. SANCTIONS ARE AWARDED AGAINST PLAINTIFF IN THE AMOUNT OF $456.30, TO BE PAID WITHIN 30 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (612/EAHEWLETT)

Off Calendar May-16-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendants Alderson's Board & Care Home For the Elderly, Coralee Alderson and Lavelle Alderson's Motion To Compel Discovery is granted. No opposition has been filed. Plaintiff is ordered to respond to Defendants' Form Interrogatories, Set One; Special Interrogatories, Set Two; Request For Production Of Documents, Set One and Two; and Supplemental Request For Production Of Documents, Sets One, within 15 days of notice of this order. Plaintiff's failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Sanctions are awarded against Plaintiff in the amount of $405, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
